aboutSection.title: About Me
aboutSection.description:
With nearly six years of professional experience, I combine the analytical rigor of my administrative background with the agility of software engineering. My goal is to deliver clean code and solutions that meet user needs.

I currently focus on full-stack development, striving to learn and grow continuously with every project.
